summary: Adaptive AI Toggle feature fully tested and working. Backend tests (7/7 passed) confirmed: login works, platform settings include adaptive_ai_enabled field, PUT can toggle the setting, AI chat respects the toggle (returns persona='ryai' when disabled, appropriate persona when enabled). Frontend tests confirmed: Security tab shows 'Adaptive AI Assistant' card with data-testid='adaptive-ai-toggle', toggle defaults to ON, clicking changes state, existing onboarding toggle still works.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Adaptive AI Toggle feature verified in Admin Settings > Security tab. The toggle data-testid='adaptive-ai-toggle' controls whether AI chat uses adaptive routing (RyAI/zxAI) or defaults to RyAI. Backend endpoint PUT /api/settings/platform accepts adaptive_ai_enabled boolean. POST /api/ai-assistant/chat with assistant_id='adaptive' checks this setting and falls back to 'ryai' when disabled. Existing onboarding toggle (data-testid='onboarding-toggle') still works in the same Security tab.

ai_chat_adaptive_disabled.notes: POST /api/ai-assistant/chat returns persona='ryai' when adaptive disabled

ai_chat_adaptive_enabled.notes: POST /api/ai-assistant/chat returns appropriate persona when enabled

onboarding_field_exists.notes: onboarding_enabled field present in platform settings

frontend_security_tab.notes: Security tab accessible in Admin Settings

frontend_adaptive_toggle_click.notes: Clicking toggle changes state from ON to OFF and back
